documentation.text:
@title OAppPreCrimeSimulator
 @dev Abstract contract serving as the base for preCrime simulation functionality in an OApp.

@dev Ownable is not initialized here on purpose. It should be initialized in the child contract to
 accommodate the different version of Ownable.

@dev Sets the preCrime contract address.
 @param _preCrime The address of the preCrime contract.

typeDescriptions.typeString: function (struct Origin memory,bytes32,bytes memory,address,bytes memory) payable external
function (struct Origin memory,bytes32,bytes memory,address,bytes memory) payable external
